query: The rules engine is letting through E10.x and E11.x together on the same claim — I think we're missing an Excludes 1 check. Can you fix src/core/icd10/rules_engine.py?
We have a patient in observation status with 'possible pneumonia' in the note. The coding agent is suggesting J18.9 — that seems wrong for outpatient. What should it suggest instead?
I need to add validation for mandatory code sequencing — when someone codes E11.22 (DM with CKD) the system should require N18.x to follow. Where does this logic go?
Can you update the coding_agent to detect when a combination code like I11.0 should be used instead of coding I10 and I50.9 separately?
The test_compliance_guardrails.py has a failing test for POA indicator validation — it expects 'Y' for ER conditions but the code returns 'U'. Can you investigate?
I need to add the list of uncertain qualifier words to the NLP negation module — things like 'probable', 'suspected', 'rule out'. What's the complete list?
We're building a new specificity upgrade detector — when the note says 'heart failure' without type, we should flag it for upgrade to I50.23. Can you add this to the CDI detection logic?
The CodingGuidelineViolationError is being raised but caught silently in the API layer. Per constitution Article II.3, this should be a hard stop. Fix the error handling in src/api/routes/coding.py
Need to update tests/clinical/test_coding_accuracy_mimic.py to check that outpatient encounters never have uncertain diagnoses coded as confirmed
I'm adding CC/MCC status lookup to the mcp_icd10_lookup tool — is N17.9 an MCC? What about I50.9?
Can you help me understand when 'ruled out' vs 'rule out' matters? A physician wrote 'pneumonia has been ruled out' and I want to make sure the coding agent handles this correctly
The OBSENC encounter class should map to outpatient coding rules, but our encounter_class_mapping dict has it as inpatient. Fix this in src/core/fhir/resources.py
I need to set up the FHIR client to handle Epic's 5-minute token expiry — the TokenManager should proactively refresh
Can you write a CDI query template for AKI that follows AHIMA non-leading standards?
The DRG grouper is calculating the wrong weight for DRG 291 — can you check the weight table in src/core/drg/grouper.py?
I need to add rate limiting retry logic with exponential backoff to the FHIR client
Can you generate a CFO-facing narrative that explains the revenue impact of documenting AKI?
Write a structlog processor that filters PHI fields from log entries before they're written
Update the FastAPI health check endpoint to return the current version number from pyproject.toml
I need to add prior authorization requirement checks — does CPT 72141 (MRI spine) require PA from UnitedHealthcare?
